name: llm_demo_rules
description: Business rules for the LLM demo completion endpoint.

rules.description: completion id is a per-call token and must be ignored
choices array must be present in every completion response
usage must be present to allow billing reconciliation
error field must never appear in a successful completion response
completion text must not be empty — catches INCOHERENT drift mode
total_tokens must be at least 1 — catches zeroed INCOHERENT usage
finish_reason must be a recognised stop signal
